summary: Comprehensive testing of DioCreations new features (Iteration 11). Backend: 28/28 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified. New features for geo-currency, dynamic menus, public user auth, user dashboard, cover letter generator, resume templates, and paywall change (free editing, pay-to-download) are all working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/geo/currency returns correct currency info with country_code, currency, currency_symbol, currency_rate, all_currencies
GET /api/admin/currency/settings returns full config with auth
GET /api/admin/menus returns all menu items with auth
DELETE /api/admin/menus/{item_id} deletes menu item and verifies removal
POST /api/user/register creates new public user account
Full auth flow: register → me → logout → session invalidated
GET /api/user/dashboard returns user analyses and cover letters
GET /api/resume/templates returns available templates with template_id, name, description, category
GET /api/admin/resume/templates returns all templates with auth
POST /api/cover-letter/generate works without auth (anonymous usage supported)
POST /api/cover-letter/generate requires input data (400 without job_description or resume_text)
POST /api/resume/improve does NOT return 402 (paywall disabled for editing)
POST /api/resume/download-access endpoint exists and checks payment status
/login page renders with Sign In and Sign Up tabs
/cover-letter page renders with job form and tone selection
Navbar shows dynamic menu items and Sign In button
Footer shows dynamic Quick Links menu
Resume Optimizer page loads with 4-step progress (Upload → Analysis → Optimize → Download)

test_credentials.test_public_user: Generated unique emails for each test

seed_data_creation: Created test users with unique emails (TEST_ prefix) during auth testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working correctly. Key implementation notes: 1) Geo-currency uses ip-api.com for IP geolocation with in-memory and DB caching. 2) Dynamic menus support nested items via parent_id field. 3) Public user auth uses separate collections (public_users, public_sessions) with pub_session_token cookie. 4) Cover letter generator uses Gemini 2.0 Flash via emergentintegrations LlmChat. 5) Resume paywall has been changed - /api/resume/improve is now free, payment is only required for download (/api/resume/download-access checks payment status). 6) Templates are stored in resume_templates collection with defaults seeded on first access.

features_verified.geo_currency_api: Working - returns correct currency based on IP with admin-configurable settings
features_verified.menus_api: Working - dynamic nav and footer menus with full CRUD support
features_verified.public_user_auth: Working - register, login, me, logout with session management
features_verified.user_dashboard: Working - returns analyses and cover letters for authenticated user
features_verified.resume_templates: Working - public and admin endpoints for template management
features_verified.cover_letter_generator: Working - AI-powered generation with tone selection
features_verified.resume_improve_paywall_change: Working - improve endpoint no longer requires payment (free editing)
features_verified.download_access_check: Working - payment check for download/copy feature
features_verified.login_page_ui: Working - Sign In and Sign Up tabs with form validation
features_verified.cover_letter_page_ui: Working - job form with tone selection and result display
features_verified.dashboard_page_ui: Working - shows analyses, cover letters, and quick actions
features_verified.navbar_dynamic_menus: Working - fetches and displays menu items from API
features_verified.footer_dynamic_menus: Working - fetches and displays Quick Links from API

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/currency/settings: 200 OK with auth - {default_currency, region_currencies, rates, symbols}
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/admin/currency/settings: 200 OK with auth - updates and persists settings
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/menus: 200 OK with auth - all menu items
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/admin/menus: 200 OK with auth - creates menu item
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/admin/menus/{item_id}: 200 OK with auth - updates menu item
api_endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/admin/menus/{item_id}: 200 OK with auth - deletes menu item
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/user/me: 200 OK with auth - {user_id, email, name, picture, auth_type}
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/user/dashboard: 200 OK with auth - {user, analyses, cover_letters, payments}
